Politics.G_Control1: The settlement is firmly under the control of {name} ({type}).
Politics.G_Control3: Agents of {name} actively infiltrate the upper echelons.
Politics.G_War1: The city is on the brink of civil war. {name1} rules officially, but {name2} violently contests this power.
Politics.G_War2: {name1} rules with an iron fist, fighting dissent sown by {name2}.
Politics.G_War3: A nest of vipers where {name1} and {name2} wage a shadow war.
Politics.U_Control1: The settlement is firmly under the control of {name}.
Politics.U_Control3: Agents of {name} actively infiltrate the city.
Politics.U_War1: On the brink of civil war. {name1} rules officially, but {name2} violently contests it.
Politics.U_War2: {name1} rules with an iron fist against dissent sown by {name2}.
Politics.U_War3: War of influence and conspiracies between {name1} and {name2}.

Shop.NoHook: The merchant has nothing special to ask for today.
Shop.PriceDisclaimer: * Prices take into account the local economic situation (Multiplier: x{mult})

Editor.RazingTooltip: Destroy the settlement from the map (the journal will be kept in your archives)
Editor.RazingConfirm: Do you really want to erase this place from the map? The journal will be kept, but the hex will be reduced to ruins.

Warning!

You are about to turn ALL settlements in the {name} region into ruins.

Narrative.NoHistory: No historical records available for this region.
Narrative.ClimateDefault: The climate is temperate and changes with the seasons.
Narrative.ClimateClear: This region enjoys a particularly mild climate and radiant sunshine almost all year round.
Narrative.ClimateSnow: It is a harsh and inhospitable land, swept by freezing winters and frequent blizzards.
Narrative.ClimateRain: The territory is subject to very high humidity, punctuated by constant showers under an often heavy sky.
Narrative.ClimateFog: A thick and mysterious fog almost permanently clings to the region's reliefs.
